# Header

Let's investigate the relationship between fuel efficiency (`mpg`) and engine displacement (`disp`) from the `mtcars` dataset. Those variables have a correlation of `r cor(mtcars$mpg, mtcars$disp) |> format(digits=2)`.

## Sub-Header

Here is a plot:

::: {#f43f12b0 .cell execution_count=1}
``` {.python .cell-code}
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

mtcars = pd.read_csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/plotly/datasets/master/mtcars.csv")

plt.scatter(mtcars["mpg"], mtcars["disp"], c="dodgerblue", s=30)
plt.xlabel("mpg")
plt.ylabel("disp")
plt.show()
```
